name: Robinhood Markets, Inc.
summary: Robinhood Markets, Inc. is a financial services platform offering commission-free investing in equities, options, cryptocurrency, and futures. Products include brokerage accounts, IRAs, a cash management account (Robinhood Money), Robinhood Gold subscription, margin lending, cash sweep, securities lending, and the TradePMR RIA custody platform. The company also operates Bitstamp, a cryptocurrency exchange, and Sherwood Media. Robinhood targets retail investors and RIAs primarily in the U.S., U.K., and internationally.

products.name: Robinhood Brokerage
products.description: Commission-free investing in equities, options, futures, and cryptocurrency for retail customers.

products.name: Robinhood Gold
products.description: Subscription service offering premium features including higher interest on cash sweep and margin access.

products.name: Robinhood IRA
products.description: Individual Retirement Accounts including traditional and Roth IRA options for customers.

products.name: Robinhood Money (RHY)
products.description: Cash management and banking-as-a-service account for Robinhood customers.

products.name: Robinhood Crypto (RHC)
products.description: Cryptocurrency trading platform for retail users.

products.name: Robinhood Credit
products.description: Credit card product offered through Robinhood Credit, Inc.

products.name: TradePMR
products.description: RIA custody and portfolio management platform serving registered investment advisors.

products.name: Bitstamp
products.description: Cryptocurrency exchange serving retail and institutional customers, acquired by Robinhood.

products.name: Robinhood Asset Management (RAM)
products.description: Asset management subsidiary offering managed investment services.

products.name: Sherwood Media
products.description: Media subsidiary producing financial content and news.

products.name: Cash Sweep
products.description: Automatically sweeps uninvested customer cash to a network of program banks earning interest.

products.name: Margin Lending
products.description: Margin loans to customers for purchasing securities, secured by pledged brokerage assets.

products.name: Robinhood Derivatives (RHD)
products.description: Subsidiary supporting futures and derivatives trading including event contracts.

products.name: Securities Lending
products.description: Platform-enabled securities lending programs allowing customers to lend assets.

products.name: Joint Investing Account
products.description: Funded joint brokerage account launched July 2024 for multiple account holders.
